workiqQueriesRun: What email threads did I send or receive most frequently in the past 7 days?
Are there recurring email types I write regularly?
Which emails required the most back-and-forth this past week?
What recurring meetings did I attend this past week?
How much total time did I spend in meetings this past week?
Which meeting types happen every week at roughly the same time?
What Teams channels or chats am I most active in over the past 7 days?
Are there questions I get asked repeatedly in Teams chats?
What types of information do I most frequently share or look up in Teams?
What types of documents did I create, edit, or review most often this past week?
Are there documents I update on a regular cadence?
What SharePoint sites or OneDrive folders do I access most frequently?
Across email, meetings, and Teams, what topics or projects consumed the most time?
Are there workflows that seem to repeat?
What tasks do multiple people on my team do independently that could be standardized?

harvestNotes: All 15 WorkIQ queries for Cycle 33 (week of 2026-03-16) returned service errors. Both parallel and sequential attempts failed with null response and null conversationId. Zero signals extracted. No data invented. Third consecutive cycle (31, 32, 33) with total failure. Likely cause: WorkIQ EULA not accepted. Recommended action: user must authorize EULA acceptance via mcp__workiq__accept_eula with URL https://github.com/microsoft/work-iq-mcp.
